title: Cannot use "Chips" for displaying data

posts.author: canbax (yusuf canbaz)
posts.cookedHtml:
I import chips like import { Chips} from "monday-ui-react-core"; and use just like here @storybook/cli - Storybook

I get error below

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @canbax!

Which version of monday-ui-react-core are you using?

posts.author: HadasFa (Hadas)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! is this issue is still relevant? If so can you try to update your monday-ui-react-core version to latest and update us id the error still reproduce?
